productDisplayName: Basics Men Blue Checked Slim Fit Shirt
description: Composition Dark blue and white checked shirt, made of 100% cotton, has long sleeves with buttoned cuffs, spread collar, buttoned front placket, patch pocket on the left chest, branding on the pocket, stitch detailing and a curved hemline Fit Slim Wash care Machine wash separately in cold water with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach Line dry inside out in shade Warm iron do not iron on decorations The stitch detailing, mix of colours and clever cut of this checked shirt from basics adds rugged styling, while the cotton fabric keeps you feeling comfortable all day. Team it with jeans and canvas shoes. Model statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
